name: Farmers Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dried skim milk powder (Carnation instant)
1/4 cup lemon juice or white vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 8 cups of skim milk in a saucepan over medium heat until warm.
2. Gradually stir in the dried skim milk powder until dissolved.
3. As the mixture begins to simmer, slowly add the lemon juice or white vinegar, stirring constantly.
4. Continue heating and adding acid until the milk solids separate completely from the whey (yellow liquid).
5. Drain the curds through a cheesecloth into a bowl.
6. Use the cooked cheese as desired, such as stuffing green peppers with salt, pepper, and herbs if added during the process.
